buildCommand: PORT=3000 pnpm -r --filter @workspace/autospot run build && rm -rf public && find . -path ./node_modules -prune -o -type d -name 'public' -print && OUTPUT=$(find . -path ./node_modules -prune -o -type d -name 'public' -path '*/dist/*' -print | head -1) && echo "Found at: $OUTPUT" && cp -r $OUTPUT ./public && ls -la ./public
